context: Create crates/anvilml-artifacts (add to workspace members). Rewrite store.rs module doc per TASKS_PHASE902.md (the cycle rationale it states is false). cargo test -p anvilml-artifacts exits 0.

description: anvilml-ipc: remove ArtifactStore and dead dependencies
context: Delete crates/anvilml-ipc/src/artifact_store.rs. In lib.rs remove 'pub mod artifact_store;' and its re-export. Do not touch ws/ or EventBroadcaster (separate, valid cycle rationale: anvilml-worker/anvilml-server; out of scope). In Cargo.toml remove chrono, sha2, sqlx, base64 -- confirmed unused elsewhere in this crate via grep. Verify lib.rs's doc claim 'does not contain process management or business logic' is true again. cargo check -p anvilml-ipc exits 0; cargo tree -p anvilml-ipc shows none of chrono/sha2/sqlx/base64.

description: anvilml-scheduler: repoint ArtifactStore import to anvilml-artifacts

description: code: remove false 'owns artifact store' claim from anvilml-server lib.rs
context: crates/anvilml-server/src/lib.rs crate-level doc comment currently states this crate owns 'the artifact store' (line 4-5: 'the WebSocket broadcaster, and the artifact store'). False after this phase -- anvilml-artifacts owns it. Remove that clause; keep the router/handlers/broadcaster ownership claims and the 'no business logic' hard constraint intact. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and docs/ANVILML_DESIGN.md's equivalent tables were already corrected manually; do not re-edit them. cargo doc -p anvilml-server builds; grep -n 'artifact store' crates/anvilml-server/src/lib.rs returns no hits.
